<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update the selected 'What to test' description - IOS only"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/beta-distribution/what-to-test/{what_to_test_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update the selected "What to test" description for the given app version.
